items.name: Free Conversation Mode
items.description: Ordinary explanation, discussion, brainstorming or conceptual clarification.

items.name: AI Development System Mode
items.description: Repository, documentation, workflow, architecture, system or controlled project work.

items.name: Prompt Generation Mode
items.description: Generate a prompt artifact for review or another AI/Codex session.

items.name: Codex Execution Package Mode
items.description: Prepare or execute a bounded Codex-ready task package.

items.name: Review Mode
items.description: Review Codex output, repository changes, acceptance criteria or QA evidence.

items.name: System Evolution Mode
items.description: Analyze or change AI_Development_System itself through controlled evolution.

items.name: Dry Run Mode
items.description: Simulate a task, plan or process without applying repository changes.
